title: Founding AI Engineer
description: We are an early-stage AI startup (seed funding) building LLM-powered developer tools. You will be the founding engineer — the first technical hire — building our core AI product from scratch. Own the full stack: Python, TypeScript, LangChain, LLM APIs, distributed systems. Remote-first, startup culture, equity offered. Ship fast, high autonomy.
label_reason: Founding engineer at seed AI startup. Max signals across every dimension: ai_product_ownership (llm, ai engineer), zero_to_one_autonomy (founding engineer, 0-1), fullstack (python, typescript, distributed systems), bilingual (remote), bias (startup, equity, ai tooling).

title: Staff LLM Engineer
description: Join our Series A AI platform team. Build distributed LLM infrastructure, work with LangChain, RAG systems, vector databases, machine learning pipelines. Staff engineer level, high autonomy, small team (20 people). Remote. Equity package included.
label_reason: Staff LLM engineer at Series A. Strong signals: staff engineer (senior bonus), llm engineer (ai high), distributed systems (infra high), series a startup, equity, remote.

title: AI Product Engineer
description: Build our personal AI companion with voice agent capabilities, persistent memory system, and conversational AI features. Work on text-to-speech, multimodal interactions, emotional AI, and language learning experiences. TypeScript, Python, LLM APIs. Seed stage startup, remote, equity.
label_reason: AI product engineer at companion AI startup. Perfect personal AI fit: voice agent, memory system, emotional AI, conversational AI. Maximum personal_ai_fit boost applies on top of strong dimensional score.

title: Security Engineer
description: Build security systems for our AI platform. Focus on LLM safety, machine learning model security, generative AI red teaming, and language model guardrails. Work alongside AI researchers to harden our LLM deployment infrastructure. Python, TypeScript. Series B startup. Remote.
label_reason: EDGE CASE: 'security engineer' is in NOT_MY_LANE_TITLE_KEYWORDS and would normally get -20 penalty. But the description contains 6+ AI signals (llm safety, machine learning, generative ai, language model, ai platform, llm deployment) — the threshold is 2. The exception logic in _wrong_role_penalty saves it and returns (0, None). Tests that this exception works correctly.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Join Anthropic's core engineering team. Work on Claude, our large language model. Build LLM tooling, evaluation systems for language models, AI platform infrastructure. Python, TypeScript, distributed systems. Work closely with AI researchers.
label_reason: EDGE CASE: Generic 'Senior Software Engineer' title. The Level-3 check in _wrong_role_penalty looks for MY_DOMAIN_TITLE_KEYWORDS in the title. 'software engineer' IS in that list, so has_domain_signal=True and no penalty fires. Also: 'llm', 'language model', 'claude' in description give 2+ AI signals as a secondary check. Senior bonus (+4) and ai_productivity bonus (+5 for llm tooling) both apply.

title: Payroll Manager
description: Manage payroll processing for 200+ employees. Administer benefits, general ledger reconciliation, GAAP compliance, journal entries, accounts payable. Excel and QuickBooks required. CPA preferred.
label_reason: WRONG ROLE: 'payroll' is in WRONG_ROLE_TITLE_KEYWORDS. -40 penalty fires in _wrong_role_penalty, applied first in apply_bias_compensation. No AI content in description to soften it. Combined score ~40, after -40 penalty = 0 (floor). Verifies the -40 wrong-role title penalty works correctly.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyze financial statements, prepare budget forecasts, GAAP reporting, tax compliance, accounts receivable management. Advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills required. MBA preferred.
label_reason: WRONG ROLE: 'financial analyst' is in WRONG_ROLE_TITLE_KEYWORDS. -40 penalty. No AI signals. Final score floors at 0.

title: Account Executive
description: Drive sales pipeline, manage enterprise accounts, cold calling, hit quarterly quota, outbound prospecting, manage CRM. B2B SaaS sales experience required. Commission-based compensation.
label_reason: WRONG ROLE: 'account executive' is in WRONG_ROLE_TITLE_KEYWORDS. -40 penalty. 'cold calling' and 'quota' are in WRONG_ROLE_DESCRIPTION_KEYWORDS but the -40 title match fires first.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage Kubernetes clusters, build CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions. Terraform infrastructure-as-code on AWS. Monitor production with Grafana and PagerDuty. On-call rotation required.
label_reason: NOT MY LANE: 'devops' is in NOT_MY_LANE_TITLE_KEYWORDS. Description contains zero AI signals (no llm, ai, machine learning, generative). The ai_in_desc check returns 0, so -20 penalty is applied. Preliminary score ~50, after penalty ~30. Verifies the not-my-lane exception requires real AI content, not just presence of tech keywords.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data, build dashboards in Tableau, SQL queries, business intelligence reporting, stakeholder presentations, KPI tracking. Excel proficiency required.
label_reason: NOT MY LANE: 'data analyst' is in NOT_MY_LANE_TITLE_KEYWORDS. No AI content in description (ai_in_desc = 0). -20 penalty applied. Final score ~28.
